settings.editor: Coaching runs in closed cohorts. New seats open only when current Lions graduate — first come, first considered. Get on the waitlist now to be reviewed for the next intake.
$6k / 6 months · $10k / year. The full system delivered through the BB3 app. ~100 active Lions train alongside you.
~$5k / month. Few seats. Referral-driven. Bespoke periodization, mind work, and direct line to Billy. Built for clients done with half-measures.
Six-figures+ concierge for global leaders, public figures, and elite athletes. Off-site, not promoted. Available only by direct referral.
45 minutes. Goals, history, constraints. Does the fit make sense for both sides.
Movement screen, strength baseline, body composition, labs if needed.
Periodized protocol. Macros, training splits, supplementation, recovery windows.
Ruthless execution. Weekly iteration. You show up. Billy runs the rest.
